overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a neon-lit urban plaza and underpass at night. The character approaches a street food vendor, descends through a red-beamed underpass with digital billboards, passes a homeless encampment, and emerges onto a busy street with NCPD signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor food vendor plaza with seating

events.description: character slows and stops to observe the food vendor's grill
vendor interacts with grill, adjusting skewers while steam rises

agents.ego_description: approaching the food vendor cart and stopping to watch the grilling process from close range

notable_agents.action: vendor tending to grill with skewers, occasionally looking up

entered.detail: illuminated orange neon sign reading 'FOODSCAPE' above storefront
mobile food cart with grill emitting steam and skewers cooking
tropical palm trees in large concrete planters
red and blue plastic chairs and tables arranged for dining

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a street food vendor in a semi-covered plaza at night. The FOODSCAPE sign glows orange above the storefront as the vendor tends to a grill with skewers. Steam rises from the cooking food as the character stops to observe, surrounded by plastic seating and palm trees in concrete planters.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional walkway between plaza and underpass

events.description: moving from open plaza into covered walkway with red structural elements

agents.ego_description: walking past the seating area toward the underpass entrance, passing a seated pedestrian

notable_agents.action: person sitting on metal bench looking at device

entered.detail: curved metal and concrete benches arranged in a row
dark entrance to covered pedestrian underpass with red ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the food vendor area into a transitional walkway lined with metal benches and palm trees. The environment shifts toward a covered underpass entrance with visible red structural beams ahead. A lone pedestrian sits on a bench to the left as the character progresses toward the darker interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass with red structural beams and digital advertising

events.description: descending concrete stairs into lower underpass level
transition from mixed lighting to dominant blue and red neon illumination

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs and through the underpass, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking through underpass, some ascending stairs

entered.detail: massive red-painted steel support beams crossing the ceiling
large illuminated advertising screens displaying product commercials
wide concrete staircase with blue railings leading to upper level
large industrial ventilation fans mounted on wall with steam exhaust

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a covered underpass characterized by massive red structural beams and pervasive neon lighting. Digital billboards illuminate the walls while industrial ventilation fans spin overhead. The space is moderately populated with pedestrians moving in various directions, and parked cars line the right side behind wooden barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass lower level with homeless encampment and vending area

events.description: encountering homeless encampment with tents and scattered belongings
passing food cart and umbrella setup in the underpass corner

agents.ego_description: walking through the lower underpass area, observing the encampment and surroundings

notable_agents.action: person standing near food cart under white umbrella

entered.detail: green camping tent set up against concrete pillar with belongings scattered around
large square concrete support column with red structural attachments
large white market umbrella shading a small food setup
scattered debris, cardboard, and discarded items along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character explores a section of the underpass occupied by a homeless encampment featuring a green tent and scattered belongings. A food vendor operates under a white umbrella nearby. The area is littered with trash and debris, illuminated by the glow of digital billboards and red overhead lighting. Concrete pillars support the structure above.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban street with market entrance and police presence

events.description: ascending concrete stairs from underpass to street level
emerging from underpass into crowded open street with market building

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs and emerging onto a busy street, navigating through crowds

notable_agents.action: crowd of diverse pedestrians walking in various directions near market entrance

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading 'MARKET' with number '10' below it
blue and white illuminated sign for Night City Police Department
large commercial building with orange and white facade and multiple entrances

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stairs from the underpass and emerges onto a bustling street level. A dense crowd moves through the plaza in front of a large market building marked with 'MARKET 10' signage. The NCPD sign is visible to the left, and the area is brightly lit with neon advertisements. The transition from the quiet underpass to the crowded street is immediate and striking.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, neon-lit food plaza through a subterranean underpass and back up into a bustling urban street. It begins by approaching a street food vendor under a glowing orange sign, where steam rises from a grill amidst concrete planters and palm trees. As the character moves forward, the open plaza narrows into a transitional walkway that leads directly into a covered underpass defined by massive red structural beams and spinning industrial fans. The scene then shifts deeper into this subterranean space, passing digital billboards and a cluttered homeless encampment with green tents and scattered debris. Finally, the camera ascends a set of stairs to emerge from the dim underpass into the bright, crowded energy of a street-level market marked by NCPD signage and dense neon advertisements.
